label: Mahbub ibn Constantine, The book of history

note: This text contains part one of the two-part Book of History. Part one can also be found in Sinai Arabic 456, while part two is only known in MS Florence, Biblioteca Medicea Laurenziana – Or. 132 (dated to 1288 CE).
